response.overview: # The Story of a Girl Carpenter  The story of a girl who chooses carpentry as her source of livelihood. Any kind of handiwork—she is quite skilled and has been trained since childhood by her father. She becomes the obsession of the village men because of her beauty that remains 'maintained' even while working. She wants to marry only a religious teacher (ustaz). The problem is, all the religious teachers in the village are either already married or very old widowers. Will there be a young, single, and handsome religious teacher with style?
response.title: Tukang Curi Hati
